{{Quote|Killing these creatures is a mercy to my planet.|Sylvar|<ref name="RD">''[[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – Redemption]]''</ref>}}
'''Kiltik''' were giant [[Beetle/Legends|beetle]]-like omnivores that lived on [[Cathar (location)/Legends|Cathar]]. They lived in hives consisting of hundreds of guards, along with a single, even-larger queen. Kiltik rested during the day, coming out of their nests en masse at night to feed. Entire sections of Cathar were reduced to barren desert by them, and [[Cathar/Legends|Cathar]] warriors would periodically engage in ritualistic [[Blood Hunt/Legends|blood hunts]] to cleanse their nests. [[Sylvar]] once wiped out an entire nest.

They may have gone extinct in [[3963 BBY]], when Cathar was devastated by the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]] in the [[Battle of Cathar]], although this was never proven, and entire hives might have existed underground.

==Appearances==
*[[Tales of the Jedi – Redemption 3|''Tales of the Jedi – Redemption'' 3]] {{1st}}
